latest_content:
# Weekly Insight — 2026-05-20

**The week in one line:** Strong revenue momentum, but list growth is the soft spot worth a deliberate push.

- **Revenue is tracking ahead of pace.** Two of four Q2 engagements are signed and the Globex proposal goes out Friday. At 68% of the $60K target with six weeks left, this goal is comfortably on track — the constraint now is delivery capacity, not pipeline.
- **The agent is carrying real load.** 41 tasks this week at $12.84 in API cost produced an estimated $3,920 in human-equivalent value — a 305x return. Cache hit ratio held at 84%, keeping per-task cost predictable.
- **Newsletter list growth is the one at-risk goal.** At 2,140 of 2,500 subscribers, the lead magnet shipped but the referral loop hasn't. Highest-leverage move this week: launch the referral incentive and lean social content toward outcome-first hooks (which engage ~3x better).
- **Competitive tempo is picking up.** Northwind abandoned its free tier and Globex added an AI services line. The opening: capture the price-sensitive founders Northwind just walked away from, and sharpen the AI-native differentiation before it becomes table stakes.
- **Two self-improvement proposals are worth applying now** — pre-staging RFP responses on Wednesdays and capping research token budgets. Both reduce manual intervention on the highest-frequency work.

history.content:
# Weekly Insight — 2026-05-13

**The week in one line:** A quiet, high-leverage week — content cadence held and ops automation crossed 70%.

- **Content cadence was fully met:** three LinkedIn posts and one newsletter shipped on schedule.
- **Automation milestone:** routine ops crossed 70% autonomous, with pipeline reporting now fully hands-off.
- **Watch item:** a single research task ran 3x over its typical token budget — worth a soft ceiling.

history.preview: Pipeline filling faster than delivery capacity — start protecting deep-work time.
history.content:
# Weekly Insight — 2026-05-06

**The week in one line:** Pipeline filling faster than delivery capacity — start protecting deep-work time.

- **Three new inbound leads** arrived, two of them warm referrals.
- **Scheduling friction:** the agent proposed slots conflicting with deep-work blocks twice — a calendar-preference check would prevent this.
- **Cache savings** topped $40 this week as session warming improved.
